CustomField.description: MIS-1519 New division fields in SFDC
CustomField.formula:
CASE(Owner_Division__c, 'Reseller - ANZ-Trellian','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - SEA-Maestros','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - India - Altudo','Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - Vietnam - AMS JSC', 'Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - China - TrueMetrics', 'Resellers APAC', 'Reseller - Australia and Pacific Islands - Bring Performance','Resellers APAC',
'Reseller - Brazil - 108','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Mexico - Hexagon Data','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Brazil - Alpha','Resellers Americas', 'Reseller - Colombia - Indices', 'Resellers Americas',
'Reseller - Turkey-CloudyFlex','Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Italy - Nubo','Resellers EMEA', 'Reseller - Spain - Cartagon', 'Resellers EMEA',
'Rank Ranger', 'Rank Ranger', Owner_Division__c )
CustomField.label: Owner Reporting Division
